title: Old Sith Wars
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=Resurgence of the Sith}} {{Citation}} {{Era |image=[[File:TOTJDLOTS2-FC.jpg]] |name= |years=[[3996 BBY]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]''–[[3950 BBY]]''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' |jurisdiction= |prev=[[Post-Manderon period]] |next=[[Inter-Sith Wars period]] |TYA=32453-32503 [[Tho Yor Arrival|TYA]] |TC=347–297 [[Treaty of Coruscant|BTC]] |BRuu= |ARuu= |GrS= |conflict=*[[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]{{CSWECite|II||Old Sith Wars}} *[[Cleansing of the Nine Houses]] *[[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]] *[[Mandalorian Wars]] *[[Jedi Civil War]] *[[Sith Civil War]] *[[Dark Wars]] *[[First Jedi Purge]] |events= }} {{Quote|The Jedi who fall are the most dangerous of all.|A line from a children's rhyme|{{WEGCite|story=A Tale from the Dark Side|book=Tales of the Jedi Companion}}}} The '''Old Sith Wars''' was the name given to the series of conflicts that started with the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] and lasted until the end of the [[Sith Civil War]] in [[3950 BBY]]. The conflicts centered around a number of fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]; [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] and [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] instigated the Great Sith War when they fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]; the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Darth Malak|Malak]] led a [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|new Sith Empire]] against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in the Jedi Civil War after they were corrupted by the hidden [[Tenebrae|Sith Emperor]] at the end of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]; and the exiled [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kreia]] rallied the remnants of Revan's empire and led them in a genocidal [[First Jedi Purge|campaign]] against the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. ==History== {{Quote|The Jedi have not won today. As you will one day learn, the Jedi have lost!|Freedon Nadd, to Arca Jeth|audio=Nadd2-TotJ.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]]}} Included in this era were the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] ([[3996 BBY]]), the [[Mandalorian Wars]] ([[3976 BBY]]–[[3960 BBY]]), the [[Jedi Civil War]] ([[3959 BBY|3959]]–[[3956 BBY]]), the [[Sith Civil War]] ([[3956 BBY|3956]]–[[3950 BBY]]), the [[Dark Wars]] ([[3955 BBY|3955]]–[[3951 BBY]]), the [[First Jedi Purge]] ([[3954 BBY|3954]]–[[3951 BBY]]), and the [[Onderon Civil War]] ([[3951 BBY]]). The almost continuous 50 years of war nearly shattered the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and resulted in a near-total annihilation of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. However, the Republic held in the end, and eliminated (at least for the time being) such threats as the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]], the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] and the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. Because of the long and bloody conflicts, the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] citizenry gained a hardened resolve, and the Republic emerged stronger than it was before. Major figures of the time period of the Old Sith Wars included [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]], [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]], [[Nomi Sunrider]], [[Kreia]], [[Mandalore the Indomitable]], [[Mandalore the Ultimate]], [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], [[Darth Malak|Malak]], [[Bastila Shan]] and [[Meetra Surik]]. While the major conflicts of the Old Sith Wars were over by the end of the Sith Civil War, the [[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]] ([[3970 BBY|3970]]–[[3670 BBY]]) continued for nearly three centuries after the triumph of the Republic and the defeat of the Sith. A major technological advance of the Old Sith Wars period was the [[Navigation computer/Legends|Navigation computer]]. It became generally available during the [[Restoration Period]] that followed the Great Sith War, and it quickly rendered the [[Hyperspace beacon/Legends|Hyperspace beacon]] system obsolete. ==Events of the Old Sith Wars== {{Quote|I am here to warn you Jedi, you must not interfere with the work of the dark side. The Dark Lords of the Sith are destined to rise again. ''Nothing'' can prevent that.''"
"''You can't frighten us with useless prophecies. I thought Master Arca drove you away when he buried your bones on that barren moon.''"
"''Arca ''cannot'' interfere with the ''dead''…nor can he help ''you'', poor Jedi, to avoid your destiny.''"
"''What are you ''talking'' about?''"
"''You…will be one of the ''great ones''.|Freedon Nadd tells Ulic Qel-Droma of his destiny as a Sith Lord|audio=Nadd3-DLotS.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]]}} *The '''[[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]''' begins in [[3996 BBY]] **3996 BBY: [[Dark Reaper campaign]] **3996 BBY: [[Duel on Kuar]] **3996 BBY: [[Battle of Foerost (Great Sith War)|Battle of Foerost]] **3996 BBY: [[Battle of Coruscant (Great Sith War)|Battle of Coruscant]] **3996 BBY: [[Sith uprising]] **3996 BBY: [[Battle of Ko Vari (Boonta)|Battle of Ko Vari]] **3996 BBY: [[Battle of Kemplex Nine]] **3996 BBY: [[First Battle of Iridonia]] **3996 BBY: [[Battle of Ossus (Great Sith War)|Battle of Ossus]] **3996 BBY: [[Battle of the Al'Har system]] **3996 BBY: [[Battle of Onderon (Great Sith War)|Third Battle of Onderon]] **3996 BBY: [[Battle of Toprawa (Great Sith War)|Battle of Toprawa]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Vindication]]''[[Knights of the Old Republic 9|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 9]] **3996 BBY: [[Battle of Yavin 4 (Great Sith War)|Battle of Yavin 4]] **3996 BBY: [[Recapture of the Empress Teta system]] ***[[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] ends (3996 BBY) *[[Restoration Period]] ([[3995 BBY|3995]] - 3966 BBY) *[[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]] begins (3995 BBY){{Tales|23|Shadows and Light}}''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' **c. 3995 BBY: [[Cleansing of Onderon]] **c. 3995 BBY: [[Cleansing of Yavin 4]] **c.
